signals.raw:
Based on the available search results, the most recent confirmed inflation data for South Korea is from **early April 2026**, when the Bank of Korea held its policy rate at 2.5% for the 7th consecutive month[4]. At that time, **consumer prices had climbed above the central bank's 2% target, with inflation reported at approximately 2.2%**[4].
